scope_summary: Archive compliance CSVs 04182026–05062026; retain compliance_05072026.csv + compliance_05072026_r2.csv per CSV management policy (max 2 active versions).

Plans 09-12: trust path xwalk sourcing fix (library items as traversal sources), timeline_anchor rationale type added, 22 xwalk edges loaded. GeoFilter/SectorFilter wired into LibraryView + ComplianceView ForYouSection. normalize-vocab-tags CI script produces ISO 3166 + NAICS _r2 CSVs. 37 data integrity + unit tests added.

Plan 08: IR 8477 trust path filtering wired into compliance For You tab. traverseXwalkPaths engine, useApplicabilityWithPaths hook, TrustPathPopover component. Derived tier renders after advisory with confidence-propagated results and Why shown popover.

Plans 03-06: concept_xwalks_05072026.csv (22 edges, IR 8477 relationships), pqc-vocab-overlay.json (NAICS + ISO 3166 vocab), CBOM schema, confidence scale (high=85/medium=60/low=30), validator checks for provenance and schema compliance.

Plans 01+02: module and workshop tool version gates with semver badges. ReviewedBadge, ConfidenceIndicator, ContentUpdatesFeed components. Learn module content version tracking wired into useModuleStore.

Plan 00 Foundation: revision log schema (revisions.jsonl), CODEOWNERS, PROV-DM provenance model. confidenceScale.ts (CONFIDENCE_SCALE high/medium/low). CI append-revision workflow stub. Baseline for Trust Engine Plans 01-12.
